query: I have this FastAPI codebase and I need to generate an OpenAPI spec from it. Can you also check if there are any breaking changes compared to our current published spec?
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this as an API design task and activates api-designer skill
Agent identifies two modes needed: Spec (generate from code) and Compat (breaking change analysis)
Agent detects REST protocol from FastAPI mention
Agent scans the codebase for route definitions and type annotations
Agent generates OpenAPI 3.1 spec from discovered endpoints
Agent runs compat-checker.py to compare generated spec with existing published spec
Agent classifies changes as breaking vs non-breaking
